tools.name: pumpfun_swap
tools.description: Build a buy or sell transaction on pump.fun. Auto-detects bonding curve vs AMM. For buys set inputMint to NATIVE_MINT (So11111111111111111111111111111111111111112); for sells set outputMint to NATIVE_MINT.

outputMint.description: Mint to receive. Use So11111111111111111111111111111111111111112 for SOL sells.

amount.description: Amount in lamports for SOL, or token smallest units (6 decimals) for token input.

feePayer.description: Fee payer public key (defaults to user)

frontRunningProtection.description: Route via Jito for MEV protection (requires tipAmount)
